subject: David Xanatos as the Steel Clan — a large winged armored figure with red and dark blue coloring soaring in the air, flanked by two smaller similar figures; gothic castle in background
description: A large, winged armored figure with red-and-dark-blue coloring soars through the air in a dominant central pose, wings fully spread, clawed hands extended. Two smaller versions of the same armored form flank it on either side — all three are robotic-gargoyle hybrid designs. The background is a gothic castle or manor with illuminated amber windows against a night sky. The overall palette is dominated by dark blue, navy, and crimson, with the glowing castle windows providing warm accent. The art is rendered in animated Disney style with strong dramatic lighting. The composition is a wide action shot with the central figure filling the upper frame.
foreground: winged armored gargoyle-robot figure soaring with wings spread
background: gothic castle with glowing amber windows under night sky
